    <script type="text/javascript">
        if (getCookie("LeagueBlockTip") == 1) $("#switchLeagueBlock").find(".pop").hide();
        if (getCookie("LeagueBlock") == 1) {
            $("#switchLeagueBlock").find("span")[0].classList.remove("on");
            $("#switchLeagueBlock").find("span")[1].classList.add("on");
        } else if (getCookie("LeagueBlock") == 0) {
            $("#switchLeagueBlock").find("span")[0].classList.add("on");
            $("#switchLeagueBlock").find("span")[1].classList.remove("on");
        }

        //联赛简称方块新旧版切换
        function switchLeagueBlockVersion() {
            var spans = _$("switchLeagueBlock").getElementsByTagName("span");
            var isOld = spans[0].className.indexOf("on") != -1;
            if (getCookie(_leagueBlock.cookie) == null) {
                _leagueBlock.display = isOld;
                window.location.reload();
            } else {
                if (isOld) {
                    spans[0].classList.remove("on");
                    spans[1].classList.add("on");
                } else {
                    spans[0].classList.add("on");
                    spans[1].classList.remove("on");
                }
                confirmLeagueBlockTip();
                displayLeagueBlock(isOld);
            }
        }

        function confirmLeagueBlockTip() {
            $("#switchLeagueBlock").find(".pop").hide();
            writeCookie(_leagueBlock.tipCookie, 1, new Date((new Date()).getTime() + 365 * 24 * 3600000));
        }
    </script>

<script type="text/javascript">
    $(document).on("click", (e) => {
        if (!_$.contains(_$("settingBtn"), e.target) && !_$.contains(_$("soccerSettingWin"), e.target)) {
            $("#soccerSettingWin").css("display", "none")
        }
    })

    function callSettingWin() {
        if ($("#soccerSettingWin").is(":visible")) {
            $("#soccerSettingWin").hide();
        } else {
            $("#soccerSettingWin").show();
        }
    }
</script>
            </div>
